RemediationStrings.Title: Field Effect MDR (Covalence) is not installed
RemediationStrings.Description: Covalence Endpoint Service was not found. Install the Field Effect MDR agent.

RemediationStrings.Title: Field Effect MDR (Covalence) is not running
RemediationStrings.Description: Covalence Endpoint Service must be running for this device to be compliant.
